coachVoice.lastWeek:
**4/4 gym, three lifts progressed cleanly, body weight on target — but the wellness data is the headline this week.**

Row +5 lb hit (150 × 10 × 4 RPE 8 across), Squat +1 rep at SAME RPE on all 4 sets (215 × 9 × 4 RPE 7.5 — textbook double-progression, you've earned the +5 lb), OHP all 4 sets done at 115 finally (3-week streak broken), Sumo DL +20 lb landed (245 × 4/5/5/6 with the conservative first-set ramp, no back symptoms). Bench RPE crept to 9 on the last set of 205 × 8 × 4 — at the ceiling, hold load.

**The big signal: wellness data flagged over-reaching.** Readiness average 56 (vs baseline ~65), HRV down ~14% vs baseline, RHR up ~5 bpm sustained. Two crash days: Wed 4/29 readiness 21 / HRV 38 / RHR 60 (post Lower A), Sat 5/02 readiness 37 (Sumo DL day). Sleep average 6.3h excluding the 16.6h Sunday outlier — below the 7h floor.

**The W19 deload was already programmed (plan v4.0). The wellness data ratifies the timing independently — you're at the edge of overreaching, not over the cliff.** Don't skip the deload. Don't "deload light." The plan calls for −50% volume, RPE 6, diet break to maintenance — that's the prescription.

**Nutrition: 3/7 days logged, avg 116g protein.** Under 50% adherence triggers the rule: no nutrition adjustments until logging gets to 5/7. The bottleneck is the spreadsheet, not the macros.

**Bodyweight: trend on target (-0.59%/wk over 22 days, 88.3 → 86.7), but W18 sampling collapsed.** All 7 days of intervals.icu pull were forward-fills (Apple Health didn't capture weigh-ins). Manual scale entry needed — the trend is good but we're flying with one eye closed if the data isn't there.

**Hip Thrust + Pallof Press: skipped 2 weeks in a row** on Lower B. The W17 reorder was prescribed but not enforced. This week we move Hip Thrust to position #1 in Lower B, even on the deload. Pallof: drop, replace with extra Ab Wheel work on Lower A (which is getting done).
coachVoice.nextWeek:
**Week 19 is the deload + diet break. Lock it in.** The plan v4.0 has it programmed in detail — follow it, don't improvise.

**Loads:** Bench 195 × 6 × 2 RPE 6 · Squat 195 × 6 × 2 RPE 6 · Sumo DL 200 × 4 × 2 RPE 6 (DOWN from 245 — conservative per the W16 contracture protocol) · OHP 105 × 6 × 2 RPE 6 · Row 140 × 8 × 2 RPE 6. Two working sets per exercise. Walk out in 30-40 min. If anything feels hard, you're doing it wrong.

**Three structural changes activate this week** (per plan v4.0): (1) Cable Fly added to Upper A — empezar liviano (15-25 lb por mano) para encontrar working load para W20. (2) 3-sec eccentric en Incline DB Press, RDL, Incline Curl, Leg Curl — practicar tempo a peso liviano. (3) Hip Thrust moves to position #1 in Lower B (before BSS).

**Running: 1 run only this week — Sat Z2 3 km, HR < 135.** The 5/01 run last week pushed HR 146 (above the new 143 ceiling). Keep this one strict.

**Diet break: ~2,900 kcal vs baseline 2,500.** +400 kcal (mostly carbs to ~385g, hold protein 170g, hold fat 75g). MATADOR-style — reduces adaptive thermogenesis, restores recovery hormones, preps you for W20 build.

**Mobility: 3 sessions mandatory** — Wed Hip Reset / Sat Lumbar / Sun Hip Reset. Pin them.

**The single biggest lever this week: sleep ≥ 7h every night.** That's what fixes the wellness signals. Deload + diet break + sleep is the trifecta — getting 2 of 3 wastes the week.

**Open ask:** weigh in manually 4-7×/week (AM, fasted, post-bathroom). Apple Health forward-fill is noise; we need real data points. And log nutrition 5/7 days minimum — or admit we're guessing on the deficit calibration.

nextWeekPlan.weekLabel: Block A · Week 5 (DELOAD + diet break + ACSM structural changes)
nextWeekPlan.summary: −50% volume, RPE 6, diet break to maintenance. Sumo DL 200 × 4 × 2 (DOWN from 245). Activate Cable Fly + 3s eccentric tempo. Mobility 3×. Sleep ≥ 7h every night.

sessions.label: Upper A — Mon
sessions.focus: Deload — practice Cable Fly + 3s eccentric Incline DB

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: −5% load, half volume. Walk out — nothing should feel hard

exercises.name: Incline DB Press (3s eccentric — practice)
exercises.note: Practice 3-sec eccentric controlado. If 3s isn't smooth, drop 5-10 lb

exercises.name: Cable Fly (NEW)
exercises.note: First time — find working weight (start 15-25 lb/hand). Stretch profundo abajo. This becomes permanent in W20

exercises.name: RDL (3s eccentric — formal from now)
exercises.note: 3s eccentric is now permanent. Practice tempo, do not chase load

sessions.label: Lower B — Fri
sessions.focus: Deload — Sumo DL conservative, Hip Thrust moved to position #1

exercises.name: Hip Thrust (MOVED TO #1)
exercises.note: Was being skipped 2 wks running — now goes FIRST. Highest glute EMG. Don't skip again

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.note: MANTENER LOAD CONSERVADORA — DOWN from 245 (W18). Post-contractura W16 protocol — full deload, no progression this week

nextWeekPlan.mobility: 3 sessions MANDATORY: Wed Hip Reset (7 min) · Sat Lumbar Decompression (10 min) · Sun Hip Reset (7 min). Pin them on calendar.
nextWeekPlan.running: 3 runs Z2 (user override × 2: first added volume in deload, then chose Z2 over Z1 citing 'Z2 burns most fat'). Coach explained the myth — Z2 has peak fat OXIDATION rate but total fat LOSS depends on 24h caloric balance, not exercise fuel mix. User proceeded. Tue PM after Lower A (lift first) · Thu AM · Sat AM. 3km each = 9km total = -38% vs W18 14.5km. HR strict 131-143, NO creep into Z3.

runningPlan.label: Tue Z2 deload
runningPlan.note: Z2 strict (131-143 bpm, NO Z3 creep). Run AFTER Lower A — lift first rule.

runningPlan.label: Thu Z2 deload
runningPlan.note: Z2 strict. Upper B day, no leg conflict.

runningPlan.label: Sat Z2 deload
runningPlan.note: Z2 strict. Standalone day. Total weekly: 9km.

nextWeekPlan.nutrition: DIET BREAK: ~2,900 kcal (vs 2,500 baseline). Protein 170g hold · Carbs ~385g (+100 vs baseline) · Fat 75g hold. Hidratación pre-sesión 500 mL within 2h. Manual weigh-in 4-7×/wk (AM, fasted, post-bathroom).
